Article Title: Why Hailee Steinfeld skipped the 2026 Oscars despite Sinners buzz along with Josh Allen
Article Text:
Hailee Steinfeld skipped 2026 Oscars (Getty Images)

Why Hailee Steinfeld’s Oscars absence happened as Sinners chased history



Hailee Steinfeld’s Oscars absence quickly grabbed the headlines. While the cast of Sinners gathered under the bright lights of the Academy Awards, the actress stayed away from the ceremony for a far more personal reason. Steinfeld is expecting her first child with Josh Allen, and the couple chose to remain at home as her due date draws near.The decision surprised some viewers who had followed the film’s remarkable awards run. Hailee Steinfeld had been present earlier in the season, including a January appearance at the Golden Globe Awards where her growing baby bump drew attention. But as Sunday’s ceremony approached, the signs pointed to a quieter evening for the actress, even as her film chased history with a record number of nominations.The absence had less to do with the film and everything to do with timing. In a message to readers of her Beau Society newsletter on March 13, Steinfeld reflected warmly on the experience of making Sinners while also hinting at why she might skip the ceremony.“When asked to recall a moment from press or filming that made her smile,” she wrote, “At this moment, being two days away from the Oscars, I know there is no one single particular moment that can encapsulate what this filming experience meant to me.These people have left a mark on me and on my heart that will never go away.”The message felt reflective and personal. It also came with a clear update on her life off screen. Steinfeld had already shared with subscribers that she was “about to have a baby,” and the timeline placed her very close to the due date.Reports on Oscars night confirmed what many had begun to suspect. Instead of joining co stars such as Michael B. Jordan on the red carpet, Steinfeld remained at home with Allen as they prepared for the arrival of their first child. The film itself, directed by Ryan Coogler, entered the ceremony with an extraordinary 16 nominations, including Best Picture.Even without her physical presence, Steinfeld remained closely tied to the moment. She plays Mary in the film opposite Jordan, and the project has been one of the most celebrated releases of the year. Earlier this month, the ensemble also picked up Best Ensemble Cast honors at the Screen Actors Guild Awards, further building momentum ahead of the Oscars.Meanwhile, Allen has been open about the life change awaiting him. Speaking during an event tied to the Buffalo Bills, the quarterback reflected on the new role that will soon define him more than football.“But this is the most important thing I’ll ever be in my life, being a dad,” Allen said. “And I know I love being a football player, and I love being a quarterback for the Buffalo Bills. But I’m looking forward to this one.”Fans have also begun speculating about another detail. Photos shared in Steinfeld’s Beau Society newsletter sparked guesses about the baby’s gender, though the couple has not confirmed anything publicly.For now, the spotlight may belong to Sinners on Hollywood’s biggest night. Yet for Steinfeld, the real milestone is arriving away from the cameras.
Article Summary: Hailee steinfeld is expecting her first child with josh allen. The couple chose to remain at home as her due date draws near. The decision surprised some viewers who had followed the film’s remarkable awards run. The film entered the ceremony with an extraordinary 16 nominations, including best picture.

Article Title: Fans react as tennis icon Maria Sharapova's photo with NBA star Luka Doncic goes viral after Lakers’ overtime win vs Nuggets: "Legends"
Article Text:
Maria Sharapova and Luka Doncic spark fan reactions.Image: X

Social media gushes over Sharapova and Doncic's courtside moment

Nobody saw this one coming! Maria Sharapova showed up at an NBA game, ended up in a photo with Luka Dončić right after a dramatic overtime finish and the internet has not stopped talking about it since. The former tennis world No. 1 was spotted courtside shortly after the Los Angeles Lakers beat the Denver Nuggets 127-125 in overtime, and somehow the evening turned into one of the most unexpected sports crossover moments in recent memory. The NBA shared the photo on X, which is probably all it needed to go properly viral. Two global superstars from completely different sporting worlds, standing together after one of the more entertaining finishes of the NBA season,and the reaction from fans was exactly what one would expect.The comments came fast. Tennis fans, basketball fans, and everyone in between had something to say about seeing Sharapova and Dončić in the same frame. For a lot of people, it was simply the last thing they expected to see on their timeline that night, which is probably why it spread the way it did.Sharapova won five Grand Slam titles and spent years as one of the most recognisable athletes on the planet. Dončić is currently one of the NBA's biggest stars.The Lakers star had just finished the game with 30 points, 11 rebounds and 13 assists, recording a triple-double in the process. His night was capped off by a fall-away jumper that sealed the win in overtime and sent the home crowd into celebration. Maria Sharapova had been watching the action courtside before meeting Dončić after the final buzzer. While the meeting itself lasted only a moment, the photo quickly became one of the most talked-about highlights from the night online.As the photo went viral on social media, NBA fans jumped into the comments section with their reactions. Many focused on the striking height difference between the two stars, while others simply enjoyed the rare crossover between tennis and basketball icons. Some users joked about Sharapova’s height, with one fan writing, “I thought Maria was tall.” Another commenter added, “She’s so tall.” Others noticed the contrast in how the two looked in the photo, with one fan joking, “Maria Sharapova looks ready for a red carpet. Luka looks ready to order wings.” Another comment referenced Luka Dončić buying Maria Sharapova’s former Manhattan Beach home, saying, “He paid a cool $25M for her pad.”But for many fans, the photo simply represented a cool crossover between two sporting worlds. One reaction summed up the mood online, “two legends from completely different sports in the same photo after a win just feels right honestly.”Whether it happens at a tennis tournament, an NBA arena or a major event, fans love seeing stars from different sports sharing the spotlight.
Article Summary: Maria sharapova met luka dončić after the los angeles lakers beat the denver nuggets 127-125 in overtime. The former tennis world no. 1 was spotted courtside shortly after the game. The nba shared the photo on x, which is probably all it needed to go properly viral.

Article Title: Luka Doncic becomes emotional after dropping 51 amid custody battle, says basketball gives him “some kind of peace”
Article Text:
Los Angeles Lakers' Luka Doncic becomes emotional as he watches a video on the large video board that was a tribute to the former Dallas Mavericks player (Image via AP Photo)

Los Angeles Lakers star Luka Doncic

Luka Doncic confirms separation and custody dispute

Luka Doncic and Anamaria Goltes were together for about a decade

Luka Doncic continues strong play with the Lakers

Doncic says his daughters remain his priority

said basketball has helped him deal with a difficult period in his personal life. The Slovenian guard is currently involved in a custody dispute with his former fiancée Anamaria Goltes over their two daughters.The situation has developed while Doncic continues to perform at a high level for the Los Angeles Lakers. On March 12, 2026, he scored 51 points against the Chicago Bulls. After the game, he said playing basketball brings him peace during the ongoing legal dispute.Luka Doncic confirmed in March 2026 that he and Goltes had separated. The two are now involved in a custody case concerning their daughters Gabriela, born in November 2023, and Olivia, born in December 2025.The conflict grew after attempts to bring the children to the United States during the NBA season did not work out. Around March 10, Goltes filed a petition in California seeking child support and attorney fees. Reports said the filing surprised Doncic.Before that, Doncic had already taken legal action in Slovenia. On February 26, he filed for an injunction seeking immediate access to his daughters. Reports state that he has seen them only twice since September 2025, for a total of two days.The case is now unfolding in both California and Slovenia.Luka Doncic and Anamaria Goltes met as teenagers in Slovenia. Their relationship continued as Doncic played in Europe for Real Madrid and later moved to the NBA with the Dallas Mavericks.They got engaged in July 2023 and welcomed their first daughter later that year. Their second daughter was born in Slovenia in December 2025.Tension reportedly increased around the time of Olivia’s birth. Doncic wanted to take Gabriela to the United States for the NBA season. Police were called during the situation, but no charges were filed and Doncic left peacefully.Goltes later removed photos of the couple from her Instagram account, which led to speculation about their breakup.Doncic said after his 51-point game that basketball gives him “some kind of peace when I play a game.”He continues to lead the NBA in scoring with 32.9 points per game and ranks third in assists at 8.5 per game. His performances have helped the Lakers reach a 41–25 record, which places them fourth in the Western Conference.His recent games include 46 points against Chicago on January 26 and 38 points against Dallas on January 24.Luka Doncic has said that his daughters remain the most important part of his life. He stated that everything he does is for their happiness.The legal case between Doncic and Goltes is ongoing in courts in Slovenia and California. While the situation continues, the Lakers guard remains focused on playing during the NBA season.
Article Summary: Luka doncic confirmed in march 2026 that he and anamaria goltes had separated. The two are now involved in a custody case concerning their daughters gabriela and olivia. The conflict grew after attempts to bring the children to the united states during the nba season did not work out.

Article Title: ‘Treat Pakistan matches like a comedy series’: Ex-cricketer slams team after series loss to Bangladesh
Article Text:
BAN vs PAK (AP Photo/Mahmud Hossain Opu)

EXCLUSIVE: Rahul Dravid on iconic Eden Gardens win against Australia in 2001

Bangladesh clinch historic ODI series

Poll What impressed you most in Bangladesh’s ODI series win over Pakistan? Strong Batting Performances Match-Winning Bowling Efforts

1st ODI -

2nd ODI -

3rd ODI -

Captain's corner after Series Conclusion

Shaheen Shah Afridi | Pakistan captain:

Mehidy Hasan

Miraz | Bangladesh captain:

Former Pakistan wicketkeeper-batter Kamran Akmal has strongly criticised the Pakistan national cricket team following their 1–2 ODI series defeat against the Bangladesh national cricket team during the Pakistan Tour of Bangladesh 2026.The series loss triggered widespread criticism on social media, with Akmal’s fiery reaction also going viral after he expressed frustration over Pakistan’s performance.Speaking about the team’s display, Akmal did not hold back in his criticism.“Why are we even bothered about the Pakistan team? Why are we analysing how they played? We should treat their games as a comedy series. Today they have brought disgrace by losing to a 10th-ranked team,” Akmal said.The ODI series between Pakistan and Bangladesh was played from March 11 to March 15, 2026, with all matches hosted at the Sher-e-Bangla National Stadium in Dhaka.Bangladesh secured a 2-1 series victory, registering their first ODI series win over Pakistan in 11 years.Bangladesh dominate: Pakistan endured a disastrous outing with the bat, getting bowled out for just 114 runs. Bangladesh pacer Nahid Rana led the bowling attack with a superb spell.The hosts chased down the target comfortably in 15.1 overs, with Tanzid Hasan Tamim scoring a quick half-century to give Bangladesh a 1-0 lead in the series.Pakistan bounce back: Pakistan responded strongly in the second ODI, putting up a competitive total of 274 and then delivering a dominant bowling performance they stopped Bangladesh for just 114 runs. The emphatic victory helped Pakistan level the series 1–1, setting up a thrilling decider.Bangladesh seal the series: Bangladesh posted a strong total of 290/5, powered by a brilliant 107 from Tanzid Hasan Tamim and a century opening stand with Saif Hassan. Pakistan fought hard during the chase, with Salman Ali Agha scoring a century, but Bangladesh pacer Taskin Ahmed delivered a crucial spell to seal an 11-run victory.The win helped Bangladesh clinch the series 2-1, marking a memorable achievement for the hosts."I think that early wicket [wickets] little bit cost us, but I'm really proud of the team. They fight till the end, and I think what we need that for youngster [youngsters] and they fight for till the last ball. (on Agha) Yeah, Salman is always a very good player, Test and ODIs he always [does well] in middle-order. He likes to play the spin and also fast bowler [bowlers]. I think Salman for a long, long time, he played for Pakistan, like a very good innings. So really proud and I think, the youngsters came here for the one-day first time and they played.... I think really, really proud today, like the way they played, really proud. And we will support them. (on his batting) Yeah, I will try, like that's my job. But yeah, Rishad bowled really well. He is a best legspinner. And I think congrats to the Bangladesh team. They played really well. (on the youngsters) Yeah, of course, there was always improvement and we also come here and they play international cricket and you need international cricket a little bit. You know, more hard work and you have to be fit in all three departments. But yeah, they are youngster [youngsters] and they played first international series. So we will back them and they played really good cricket.""Definitely, it was excellent match. And yes, sometimes I also afraid, like, you know, the boys played really well and the last over 14 runs, everybody is afraid there. (on their score) Definitely. I think it was excellent wicket. If we get 300, definitely it would be better. But still we're playing well, especially like Tamim, the way he batted. And definitely, they played really, really well. And then Litton Das and Shanto, and Towhid Hridoy , they played really well in the middle. (on Taskin) Yeah, definitely. I think Taskin bowled really well. The first three overs, he took two wickets. And in the end, he got two wickets. Definitely, the momentum is there. I think whole of the series, I think Taskin, Nahid Rana they bowled really, really well. And they make the partnership. So I'm really, really happy."
Article Summary: Bangladesh secured a 2-1 series victory, registering their first odi series win over pakistan in 11 years. Pakistan endured a disastrous outing with the bat, getting bowled out for just 114 runs. Bangladesh pacer taskin ahmed delivered a crucial spell to seal an 11-run victory. "if we get 300, definitely it would be better.

Article Title: 'Bhai isko abhi delete kar de': Shivam Dube’s off-guard reaction to camera goes viral - Watch
Article Text:
Shivam Dube (X)

Kuldeep Yadav marries Vanshika | couple exchange garlands in beautiful wedding ceremony

Poll What do you admire most about Shivam Dube? His Cricketing Talent His Friendly Nature With Fans

Shivam Dube recently caught fans’ attention on social media after a funny interaction with paparazzi outside his Mumbai residence went viral. The brief moment offered a glimpse of the India all-rounder’s relaxed and playful side away from the cricket field.The incident took place outside Dube’s upscale apartment complex in Andheri West, a building that houses several personalities from the sports and entertainment industries. In the viral clip, the cricketer is seen near the reception area while speaking on the phone when a paparazzo approaches him with a camera. Although slightly surprised at first, Dube acknowledges the photographer and greets him politely.In the video, Dube, clad in a maroon kurta, appears surprised as the paparazzo excitedly greets him."Bhai aapko dekh liya hum log ne (Brother, we have already seen you)," the man is heard saying in the video before asking the cricketer how he has been doing."Badiya bhai (I've been great)," Dube replies with a thumbs up, to which the man says, "Humara desh ka naam roshan kar diya aap ne (You've made our nation proud)."The moment becomes even more amusing when the all-rounder realises he is being filmed and jokingly says, “Bhai isko abhi delete kar de.”Dube’s popularity has grown significantly following India’s triumph in the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026. The all-rounder played an important role throughout the tournament and emerged as one of the unsung heroes of the title-winning campaign.Having already contributed to India’s successful run in 2024, Dube stepped up again in 2026 with an even bigger impact. Across eight innings, he scored 235 runs at a strike rate of 169.06, producing crucial cameos in several matches and consistently providing momentum when it mattered most.
Article Summary: Shivam dube recently caught fans’ attention on social media after a funny interaction with paparazzi outside his mumbai residence went viral. The incident took place outside dube’s upscale apartment complex in andheri west, a building that houses several personalities from the sports and entertainment industries.

Article Title: Beyond the bling: Hardik Pandya remains India’s most reliable big-match allrounder
Article Text:
Hardik Pandya (PTI Photo)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

Gautam Gambhir reflects on India’s World Cup win and backing Sanju Samson in the tournament

Poll Which do you consider Hardik Pandya’s standout quality as a player? Bowling under pressure Batting in crucial moments

MUMBAI: Of late, Hardik Pandya has been making headlines for reasons beyond cricket. His cosy celebrations with girlfriend Mahieka Sharma after India’s triumph in the 2026 T20 World Cup drew criticism, with a Nagpur-based advocate even filing a police complaint. Reports of the allrounder buying a Rs 12-crore Ferrari 12Cilindri have added to the chatter around his flamboyant lifestyle — from his blonde hairstyle to the trademark gold chain.Yet, amid all the noise, Pandya’s crucial role in India’s back-to-back T20 World Cup triumphs in 2024 and 2026 has not received the same attention.In both the 2026 semifinal against England at the Wankhede Stadium and the 2024 final against South Africa in Barbados, Pandya delivered decisive spells at the death, proving the perfect pace-bowling foil to the peerless Jasprit Bumrah.Bumrah rightly walked away with most of the accolades, but Pandya’s contributions were equally vital.In the 2026 semifinal, Pandya chipped in with a 12-ball 27 before returning figures of 2/38 in four overs in a high-scoring contest.When he came on to bowl the 19th over, England needed 39 off two overs, with Jacob Bethell — who blasted 105 off 48 balls — threatening to chase down India’s daunting 253. After Bethell launched the first ball for six, Pandya responded brilliantly, conceding just three runs from the next five deliveries and dismissing Sam Curran.With 30 needed off the final over, Pandya then produced a moment of brilliance in the field — a bullet throw from long-off that ran out Bethell at the start of the 20th over, effectively sealing the match for India.Overall, Pandya finished the tournament with nine wickets in nine matches at 32.33, an economy of 8.81, while scoring 217 runs at a strike rate of 160.74, including two fifties.With the bat, one of his key contributions came against Netherlands in Ahmedabad, where his 21-ball 30, including three sixes, helped India recover from 110/4 in the 14th over. His 76-run stand with Shivam Dube lifted India to 196/6, a total that proved just enough in the end.Two years earlier, after enduring perhaps the toughest IPL season of his career with Mumbai Indians , Pandya bounced back magnificently in the 2024 T20 World Cup, taking 11 wickets in eight matches at 17.36 while scoring 114 runs at 48, including a fifty.In the 2024 final in Barbados, while Bumrah’s 2/18 grabbed the headlines, it was Pandya who turned the game with figures of 3/20 in three overs. When he returned for the 17th over, South Africa needed 26 off 24 balls. Pandya conceded just four runs and removed the dangerous Heinrich Klaasen, who had blasted 52 (27b).Entrusted with the final over, Pandya then had David Miller caught by Suryakumar Yadav, whose stunning running catch sealed India’s dramatic seven-run win.A source close to Pandya says cricket remains the allrounder’s primary focus, especially around major tournaments.“Cricket is his first love. It takes precedence over everything else. But away from the field, he enjoys his life and doesn’t worry about what people say. His philosophy is simple: live life fully, but when it comes to cricket, be completely dedicated.”According to the source, Pandya enters a different ‘zone’ before major tournaments. “He was rested from the ODI series against New Zealand in Jan and focused entirely on preparing for the T20 World Cup. He trained twice daily, stayed disciplined and avoided social media. He believes in practising in silence rather than showing everything on Instagram.”The source added that Pandya even logs off social media a month before major tournaments. “He doesn’t read newspapers or follow online chatter. His focus is only on winning the trophy.”Over the years, Pandya’s understanding of the game has also improved significantly. “As a batter he reads bowlers well, and as a bowler he reads batters well. He may not be the quickest, but he uses his intelligence and variations — especially that outswinger — to get the job done.”Though no longer India’s captain in any format, the 32-year-old has embraced his role as a senior leader in the side. During the World Cup, he was often seen encouraging teammates, especially fellow allrounder Shivam Dube, in team huddles.Quite simply, Pandya remains one of the finest white-ball allrounders in world cricket — arguably India’s best since the legendary Kapil Dev.Frequent injuries may have cost him the white-ball captaincy, but Pandya has repeatedly returned leaner, fitter and hungrier.Nearly eight years ago, after playing his eighth Test at Southampton against England, Pandya stepped away from red-ball cricket to extend his white-ball career — a decision that has clearly paid off. In limited-overs cricket, Pandya remains the player India can rely on with both bat and ball.
Article Summary: Hardik pandya has been making headlines for reasons beyond cricket. His cosy celebrations with girlfriend mahieka sharma after india’s triumph in the 2026 t20 world cup drew criticism. Reports of the allrounder buying a rs 12-crore ferrari 12cilindri have added to the chatter around his flamboyant lifestyle.

Article Title: 'Phone pakad, social media hata': Abhishek Sharma reveals tough advice from Suryakumar Yadav, Gautam Gambhir, Hardik Pandya
Article Text:
Abhishek Sharma (AFP Photo)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

Amritsar erupts as Abhishek Sharma’s family celebrates India’s T20 World Cup triumph

Poll How confident are you in Abhishek Sharma's future performance after the World Cup? Very confident Unsure

NEW DELHI: Abhishek Sharma did not expect to begin the T20 World Cup 2026 the way he had planned, dreamt and desired. The swashbuckling opener, known for his blistering batting and high strike rate while pummelling bowlers all over the park, endured a nightmare start to the tournament. Abhishek was out for a duck in India’s opening match against the USA and then failed to score again in the next match against arch-rivals Pakistan.He was once again given a chance by the team management in the third match against the Netherlands, but it was the same story for Abhishek — a third consecutive duck.The disappointment, lack of confidence and hunger to score were clearly visible on Abhishek’s face. That was when captain Suryakumar Yadav and head coach Gautam Gambhir stepped in to support the youngster during his tough phase.Abhishek has now revealed the radical advice he received from Gambhir and Surya during his darkest phase in the recently concluded T20 World Cup 2026.Speaking at the India Today Conclave, Abhishek admitted that after his second consecutive duck in the tournament, he was close to an emotional breakdown.“Slowly you get used to it. But it does feel bad (when there is criticism). That is going to happen in India because people have a lot of expectations from you. After I scored three ducks, Surya, GG sir and Hardik Pandya came to me and said, ‘Phone pakad, social media hata abhi ke abhi [take your phone and uninstall social media right now]'," Abhishek said.“That was the first thing I did after my second zero. That actually helped me a bit. I was getting a lot of suggestions and comments from people. That’s how a cricketer’s life is. You have to listen and you will be criticised. All you can do is listen and ignore. That is because they have a lot of expectations from you. Sometimes you deliver and sometimes you don’t. I expected this.”After scoring three ducks in a row, Abhishek finally returned among the runs with 15 against South Africa. He soon regained his rhythm, scoring 55 against Zimbabwe and looking close to his fluent best.However, he once again struggled against England, managing just nine runs.All eyes were on him in the title clash. This time, however, Abhishek had other plans. He smashed New Zealand bowlers all over the park in the final, scoring a blistering 52 off just 21 balls and stitching a 98-run opening partnership with Sanju Samson to lay a solid foundation for India.India went on to post a massive 255/5 in their allotted 20 overs before bowling New Zealand out for 159 to win the T20 World Cup 2026 title.It was India’s third T20 World Cup triumph, having previously lifted the trophy in 2007 and 2024.
Article Summary: Abhishek sharma endured a nightmare start to the t20 world cup 2026. He was out for a duck in india’s opening match against the usa and then failed to score again in the next match against arch-rivals pakistan. The disappointment, lack of confidence and hunger to score were clearly visible on his face.

Article Title: Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Grands Prix cancelled, F1 boss Stefano Domenicali says “We cannot wait to be back”
Article Text:
Saudi Arabian Grand Prix (Image credit: Getty Images)

F1 cancels Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Grands Prix amid Middle East tensions



Bahrain GP and Saudi Arabian GP bosses react to race cancellation



After much consideration amid persisting tensions in the Middle East, the FIA has cancelled the Bahrain Grand Prix and Saudi Arabian Grand Prix scheduled for April. The two races will not be replaced by any other venues in the 2026 F1 calendar. The Round 4 race in Bahrain was scheduled for April 10–12, while the Round 5 race in Saudi Arabia was scheduled for April 17–19. This confirms that the Japanese Grand Prix will be followed by a month-long break for the F1 teams. The decision came ahead of the Chinese Grand Prix final in Shanghai on Sunday.As the Bahrain Grand Prix and Saudi Arabian Grand Prix stand cancelled, the Formula 2, Formula 3 and F1 Academy rounds will also not take place during their scheduled weekends.Confirming the same, Formula 1 President and CEO Stefano Domenicali said in a statement: “While this was a difficult decision to take, it is unfortunately the right one at this stage considering the current situation in the Middle East. I want to take this opportunity to thank the FIA as well as our incredible promoters for their support and total understanding, as they were looking forward to hosting us with their usual energy and passion.We cannot wait to be back with them as soon as circumstances allow us to do so.”FIA President Mohammed Ben Sulayem added, “The FIA will always place the safety and wellbeing of our community and colleagues first. After careful consideration, we have taken this decision with that responsibility firmly in mind. We continue to hope for calm, safety and a swift return to stability in the region, and my thoughts remain with all those affected by these recent events.”As if hinting at the possibility of rescheduling the two races later in the year, he further added: “Bahrain and Saudi Arabia are incredibly important to the ecosystem of our racing season, and I look forward to returning to both as soon as circumstances allow. My sincere thanks to the promoters, our partners and our colleagues across the championship for the collaborative and constructive approach that has led to this decision. ”Reacting to the announcement, Sheikh Salman bin Isa Al Khalifa, Chief Executive of the Bahrain International Circuit, said: “We fully support the decision by Formula 1, and we are grateful to them and to the FIA for their support and enduring partnership. We look forward to welcoming fans from all around the world back to Bahrain when F1 returns. On behalf of all of us at BIC, I take this opportunity to offer our sincere thanks to all those in the F1 community who have taken the time to send us messages of support. ”HRH Prince Khalid bin Sultan Al-Abdullah Al-Faisal, Chairman of the Saudi Automobile and Motorcycle Federation (SAMF) and Chairman of the Saudi Motorsport Company (SMC), also shared his response. He said in a statement: “The Saudi Automobile and Motorcycle Federation respects the decision taken by Formula 1 regarding the 2026 race calendar. Fans across the Kingdom were once again looking forward to the Formula 1 STC Saudi Arabian Grand Prix in Jeddah this April, but we understand the considerations behind this decision and remain in close partnership with Formula 1. ”As a result, if the two races are not incorporated into the calendar later in the year, F1 drivers will have 22 races instead of 24 to compete in this season.Also read: Carmen Montero Mundt dons George Russell’s jacket at Sprint Qualifying, Alexandra Leclerc also turns heads in Shanghai
Article Summary: F1 cancels bahrain and saudi arabian grands prix amid middle east tensions. The two races will not be replaced by any other venues in the 2026 f1 calendar. Japanese grand prix will be followed by a month-long break for the f1 teams.

Article Title: ‘I’ll hit it’: Samson reveals Sooryavanshi’s fearless chat with Dravid before IPL debut
Article Text:
Rahul Dravid and Vaibhav Suryavanshi (Image credit: BCCI/IPL)

Fearless response before IPL debut



Youngest player to debut in IPL



A big dream for IPL 2026



As the Indian Premier League 2026 approaches, young sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi once again grabbed attention after Sanju Samson revealed an amusing behind-the-scenes story from the teenager’s debut season with Rajasthan Royals . The moment was shared during the BCCI Naman Awards ceremony, where several Indian players gathered to celebrate the country’s recent cricketing achievements.Samson recalled a conversation between Sooryavanshi and former India head coach Rahul Dravid on the eve of the youngster’s IPL debut.According to Samson, RR coach Rahul Dravid had called the teenage batter for a meeting before his first IPL match to discuss how he should approach the game. Dravid wanted to guide the youngster and asked him about his plans for the match. However, Sooryavanshi’s response surprised everyone in the room.“I was actually there in the meeting,” Samson said. “Rahul Sir called him into the room and told me, ‘Sanju, we need to talk to him. He’s a very young kid; we have to explain how to go about it’ he added.“So Rahul Sir asked him, ‘ Vaibhav , what’s the plan?’ Vaibhav replied, ‘Kuch nahi Sir, hum to khelenge (Nothing special, Sir. I’ll just play).’ Rahul Sir asked again, ‘What’s your game plan?’”“Vaibhav said, ‘Agar hume pehla ball mila to hum pehla hi uda denge’ (If the first ball is in my zone, I’ll hit it in the air).And that’s exactly what he did. He’s playing a video game of his own,” Samson added.Sooryavanshi created history in IPL 2025 when he became the youngest player ever to debut in the tournament after being signed by Rajasthan Royals for Rs 1.1 crore. His debut came against Lucknow Super Giants, and he made an immediate impact. Facing experienced India all-rounder Shardul Thakur on the very first delivery of his IPL career, the youngster smashed a six.Sooryavanshi, who shared the stage at the awards ceremony with players, also spoke about his ambitions for the upcoming IPL season.“The goal is to win the trophy for the team this season. If we win the trophy, it benefits the entire franchise as well as my own performance,” he said. “My aim is to contribute as much as I can to help the team lift the trophy.” Sooryavanshi Said
Article Summary: Vaibhav sooryavanshi became the youngest player ever to make an ipl debut. He made his debut for rajasthan royals against lucknow super giants. Sanju samson revealed an amusing behind-the-scenes story from the teenager's debut season.

Article Title: Indian Wells: Jannik Sinner beats Daniil Medvedev in thrilling final; Aryna Sabalenka wins women’s title
Article Text:
Jannik Sinner, of Italy, right, is congratulated by Daniil Medvedev, of Russia. (AP Photo)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

Jannik Sinner capped a dominant run at the Indian Wells Masters by defeating Daniil Medvedev 7-6(6), 7-6(4) in a gripping final to lift his first title in the California desert on Sunday. The Italian world No. 2 produced a stunning comeback in the second-set tiebreak, winning seven consecutive points from a 0-4 deficit to seal the championship without dropping a set all tournament.The victory continued Sinner’s recent dominance over Medvedev, marking his ninth win in their last 10 meetings. Medvedev had earlier stunned top seed Carlos Alcaraz in the semifinals, handing the Spaniard his first defeat of the season at the BNP Paribas Open.After the win, Sinner also celebrated a big day for Italian sport, congratulating rising Formula One star Kimi Antonelli on his Chinese Grand Prix triumph. “It’s been a special day for Italy,” Sinner said. “I’m a huge Formula One fan and seeing such a young Italian win is amazing.”Earlier, world No. 1 Aryna Sabalenka clinched her maiden Indian Wells women’s title with a hard-fought 3-6, 6-3, 7-6(6) victory over Elena Rybakina in sweltering desert conditions.Sabalenka showed remarkable resilience in a tense decider. After being broken while serving for the match at 5-4, the Belarusian recovered in the tiebreak despite Rybakina holding a championship point. Sabalenka responded with a stunning backhand winner before sealing the title with a powerful serve that Rybakina sent long.“I wanted to stay mentally strong no matter what,” Sabalenka said. “I tried to show through my body language that I’m here to fight.”The victory gave Sabalenka a 9-7 edge in her head-to-head rivalry with Rybakina. It also capped a memorable stretch for the 27-year-old, who recently celebrated a personal milestone with her engagement to Brazilian businessman Georgios Frangulis.Sabalenka, the defending champion at the upcoming Miami Open, said celebrations would be brief as she heads to Florida aiming to carry her winning momentum into the next major stop on the tour.
Article Summary: Jannik sinner beats daniil medvedev to win the indian wells masters. Italian world no. 2 produced a stunning comeback in the second-set tiebreak. Aryna sabalenka beat elena rybakina to win her maiden indian wells women's title.

Article Title: Formula 1: Formula 1 cancels Bahrain and Saudi Arabia Grands Prix amid Middle East tensions; season cut to 22 races
Article Text:
Middle East tensions force F1 to cancel Bahrain and Saudi races, leaving five-week season gap / Image: file

Middle East conflict forces F1 to cancel Grands Prix

Bahrain, Saudi, Kuwait Under Attack; One Killed In Manama As Iran Strikes Again

Why Bahrain and Saudi Arabia races were cancelled?

Impact on the 2026 F1 season schedule

Japanese Grand Prix – March 29

Next race: Miami Grand Prix – May 3

What happens to fans who bought F1 tickets?

What F1 said about future races?





In a move that has reshaped the 2026 racing season, Formula 1 and the FIA officially announced on Sunday, March 15, 2026, that the upcoming Grands Prix in Bahrain and Saudi Arabia will not take place this April.The decision, made in the early hours ahead of the Chinese Grand Prix in Shanghai, responds to the escalating conflict in the Middle East. While the sport prides itself on "The Show Must Go On" mentality, the safety of the 10 teams, thousands of staff, and millions of fans has taken absolute precedence over the checkered flag.The Bahrain Grand Prix was originally scheduled for April 12 at the Sakhir circuit, followed by the Saudi Arabian Grand Prix in Jeddah on April 19, both are traditionally held as night races under floodlights.FIA President Mohammed Ben Sulayem said the organisation had to prioritise the wellbeing of everyone involved in the championship, emphasising that safety remained the top priority.The announcement came ahead of the Chinese Grand Prix weekend in Shanghai, ending weeks of speculation over whether the races could still go ahead amid growing instability in the region.The cancellations are directly linked to the widening conflict involving Iran and military actions by the United States and Israel, which have triggered retaliatory strikes across parts of the Middle East.Security risks and regional instability made it impossible for Formula 1 to guarantee the safe staging of the events.Logistical challenges also played a major role. Formula 1 races require massive freight shipments of cars, equipment and broadcast gear weeks in advance. With airports disrupted and security concerns rising, transporting the necessary cargo to the region became increasingly difficult.Officials also considered possible replacement venues for April but ultimately decided that reorganising the calendar at such short notice was not feasible.With both Middle Eastern races removed, the 2026 Formula 1 calendar shrinks from 24 races to 22.The decision also leaves a rare five-week gap in the schedule:This unexpected break could give teams extra time to upgrade their cars, particularly important in 2026 because the sport introduced significant technical regulation changes. Other support series events scheduled alongside the races—including Formula 2, Formula 3 and the F1 Academy—have also been cancelled for those rounds.Formula 1 organisers have said fans who purchased tickets in advance for the cancelled races will be contacted directly by event organisers regarding refunds and further options.Both the Bahrain Grand Prix and the Saudi Arabian Grand Prix had already begun ticket sales months earlier, with many international fans planning trips around the April race weekends.Local race promoters are expected to provide full refunds or possible ticket transfer options depending on the policies set by organisers and ticketing platforms. Fans are advised to monitor official communications from race organisers and the official channels of Formula 1 for updates.Travel plans such as hotels and flights booked independently may need to be managed directly with airlines and accommodation providers.Formula 1 leadership stressed that Bahrain and Saudi Arabia remain crucial partners for the sport and expressed hope that racing will return to both venues once conditions stabilise.F1 CEO Stefano Domenicali acknowledged the decision was difficult but unavoidable given the current situation in the region. Officials also thanked local organisers for their cooperation and understanding.While the races will not take place in April, the FIA has not entirely ruled out the possibility of future editions once the geopolitical situation improves.
Article Summary: Middle east tensions force f1 to cancel bahrain and saudi races, leaving five-week season gap. Announcement came ahead of the chinese grand prix weekend in shanghai. Security risks and regional instability made it impossible for formula 1 to guarantee the safe staging of the events.

Article Title: Blueface sparks controversy accusing Adin Ross of manipulating Brand Risk fights after tough loss to Chibu in Miami
Article Text:
Blueface sparks controversy accusing Adin Ross of manipulating Brand Risk fights after tough loss to Chibu in Miami (Image via Getty)



Blueface loses to Chibu at Adin Ross’ Brand Risk boxing event as Adin Ross praises Chibu after the six round fight





Rapper Blueface made strong claims after his boxing loss at a fight card run by streamer Adin Ross. The rapper said the fight outcomes at the Brand Risk boxing event were not fair and suggested that the results were influenced. The cruiserweight main event happened during Brand Risk 013, a boxing card promoted by Ross under Brand Risk Promotions. The event took place on March 14, 2026, in Miami and was streamed live on Ross’ Kick channel. Blueface fought streamer Chibu in a six-round bout but lost by unanimous decision.A video shared on X on March 15 by user FearBuck showed a tense moment in the ring after the fight. Ross asked the rapper if he would return to the Brand Risk promotion.Blueface answered by questioning the fairness of the event and hinted that the result may have been influenced.“Can we get you back in here, bro? Can we see you back in Brand Risk?” Adin Ross asked.Blueface replied with a pointed response.“Hey, you know d*** well you are not going to lose your own money on your own fight card. I definitely would not score that as their decision. I would give it four to two. But hey, shout out to Brand Risk,” Blueface said.Adin Ross thanked him for the mention and asked if he would consider a rematch. But Blueface made it clear he may not fight for the promotion again.“I probably will not get back on Brand Risk because you are tampering with the bets,” Blueface said.Adin Ross quickly denied the claim.“Never that,” Adin Ross said, adding that he had no idea what Blueface meant.As of now, Brand Risk Promotions has not released any official statement about the accusation.Blueface’s return to boxing had drawn attention because he had not fought since knocking out Ed Matthews in 2023. At that time, he weighed around 157 pounds. After serving time in prison for a probation violation linked to a 2021 battery case, the rapper gained significant weight and returned to the ring much heavier.According to a March 15 report from Bloody Elbow, the early moments of the fight showed some skill from Blueface. In the opening round, he landed a few clean punches while Chibu used a more aggressive power style, but the fight soon changed.In the second round, Chibu pushed Blueface back to the ropes and landed strong body shots. One heavy sequence knocked Blueface out of the ring, although the referee did not rule it a knockdown. From that moment, Chibu controlled the fight. Blueface struggled to deal with the pressure as Chibu kept pushing forward. In the final round, Chibu trapped him in the corner and threw a long series of punches that nearly forced the referee to stop the bout.All three judges scored the fight for Chibu, giving him a unanimous decision victory and the biggest win of his career.After the fight, Adin Ross praised Chibu inside the ring.“Chibu, you are the champ. Forget what they are talking about. You are the champion of this Brand Risk event,” Ross said.Chibu admitted the six-round fight was tough and said he plans to improve his conditioning and possibly move toward cruiserweight competition. The result may also affect Blueface’s next scheduled bout against former NBA champion Nick Young on May 2 at the James L. Knight Center, which had already begun selling tickets.
Article Summary: Rapper blueface lost to streamer chibu in a six-round bout on march 14, 2026, in miami. Blueface said the fight outcomes at the brand risk boxing event were not fair and suggested that the results were influenced. Adin ross quickly denied the claim and said he had no idea what blueface meant.

Article Title: Twitch Streamer Suspension: Twitch streamer Sonic_sol suspended after sneaky Capcom Cup Top 16 broadcast
Article Text:
Image Via X

“2-day vacation”

Why Sonic_sol got a Twitch suspension for Capcom Cup stream





Recently, a Twitch streamer by the name Sonic_sol was suspended for two days on the platform after he attempted a unique way of displaying the Capcom Cup Top 16 matches on his stream. The Capcom Cup is a renowned gaming tournament that features Street Fighter games. This year, the Top 16 matches were pay-per-view (PPV), which means fans have to buy a ticket to watch them. The tickets cost between $27 and $40. Only people who pay can watch these special matches, while the earlier rounds are free.Sonic_sol tried to share the matches in a clever way by reflecting the screen in his glasses during his Twitch stream. Many fans noticed this trick, and the news quickly spread online. After the stream, his temporary suspension was reported by the tracker page StreamerBans. Sonic_sol joked about it, saying it was just aand that he would be fine. Even though Twitch hasn’t officially said why the ban happened, the timing makes it clear it had something to do with showing the PPV content.Capcom made rules for the PPV matches to protect their paying viewers. They clearly said that no one should share videos or streams of the Top 16 matches without permission. This includes social media, Twitch, or even indirect ways like reflections. The company wants fans who pay for the matches to enjoy them without spoilers or leaks. By reflecting the stream in his glasses, Sonic_sol accidentally broke these rules, even if it was unintentional.Twitch usually follows the rules set by the content owner, which is why they issued a short suspension.Despite the suspension only lasting two days, it illustrates the importance that streaming sites place on their copyright laws. Fans still support Sonic_sol because he is a popular figure within the fighting game fanbase. He streams and plays games such as Street Fighter and Guilty Gear, and his streams include tournament action, tips and tricks, and entertaining commentary.Ultimately, the lesson to be learned from this situation is that streaming paid content without permission is trouble waiting to happen, no matter how creative the approach is. Fans can still view the tournament by purchasing a ticket to the event, and streamers such as Sonic_sol can continue to entertain their fanbase by only sharing content that he is allowed to share.
Article Summary: A twitch streamer by the name sonic_sol was suspended for two days on the platform after he attempted a unique way of displaying the capcom cup. The capcom cup is a renowned gaming tournament that features street fighter games. This year, the top 16 matches were pay-per-view (ppv), which means fans have to buy a ticket to watch them.

Article Title: Shattering records and cultivating future stars
Article Text:
Mayura Shanbaug

Ashish Kumar Srivastava - MD and CEO of PNB MetLife

Sameer Bansal - Chief Distribution Officer of PNB MetLife

Chirag Shetty - Asian Games Gold Medalist & JBC 2023 mentor

Satwiksairaj Rankireddy - Asian Games Gold Medalist & JBC 2023 mentor

Disclaimer: Content Produced by PNB Metlife

The 7th PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship shattered records with over 8,200 young talent nationwide, earning global recognition and fostering a culture of resilience and determination in aspiring badminton starsIn a spectacular display of badminton prowess and youthful enthusiasm, the 7th edition of the PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship (JBC) etched its name in the annals of sporting history. Celebrating a staggering participation of 8257 young champions from across India, the championship not only broke its own record set in 2022 but also clinched the title of the ‘Most kids participating in a Badminton Championship in multiple cities’ as recognised by the World Record Certification Agency (WRCA).The grand finale unfolded at the Indira Gandhi Indoor Stadium in New Delhi, where the air was thick with competition, camaraderie, and the unmistakable passion for badminton. The event, graced by chief guests Chirag Shetty and Satwik Rankireddy, Asian Games Gold Medalists and JBC 2023 mentors, was a true celebration of the sport’s rising stars.The 10-city extravaganza, spanning the length and breadth of the country, showcased the unwavering commitment of PNB MetLife in nurturing young talents in the badminton arena. With participants exceeding 8200, it’s evident that the PNB MetLife JBC has become a beacon for aspiring shuttlers, highlighting the deep-seated passion for badminton among the diverse and talented youth of India.Beyond the glitz and glamour of the record-breaking numbers, the championship holds a special place in the hearts of those at the helm. Ashish Kumar Srivastava, MD and CEO of PNB MetLife, expressed pride in not just surpassing their own world record but also in contributing to India’s glory on the international badminton stage. The championship, he emphasized, is not merely a competition but a significant milestone in creating a pan-India badminton ecosystem.This edition of the JBC saw a strategic partnership with world champions Chirag Shetty and Satwiksairaj Rankireddy, who served as mentors for the young talents. Sameer Bansal, Chief Distribution Officer of PNB MetLife, acknowledged the pivotal role played by these champions in inspiring the next generation of badminton stars. The focus, according to Bansal, is on unleashing the latent potential of young shuttlers and preparing them for global excellence.The Delhi chapter of the championship witnessed some nail-biting action with over 1000 participants competing fiercely across various categories. From Ananya Talyan’s stellar performance in Girls Singles Under 9 to Divyansh Rawat’s triumph in Boys Singles Under 17, the young talents left no shuttle unturned in their quest for victory.The results from the Delhi leg not only showcased the raw talent but also highlighted the championship’s commitment to breaking barriers. The PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship is not just about records; it’s about fostering a culture of healthy living, determination, and resilience among the future champions of the sport.In the words of Satwiksairaj Rankireddy, the championship serves as an invaluable platform.---------------------------------------------------------------As we celebrate the successful culmination of the 7th edition of PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship , we take pride in surpassing our own world record for highest participation and for being recognized by World Record Certification Agency. Beyond the records, JBC represents a significant milestone in our mission to lay the groundwork for India’ s glory and success on the international badminton stage by creating a pan-India badminton ecosystem that nurtures champions at the grassroots levelThis year has been especially remarkable for PNB MetLife JBC as we joined hands with world champions Chirag Shetty and Satwiksairaj Rankireddy as JBC Mentors for the young talents associated with this tournament. They have played a pivotal role in inspiring young shuttlers to dream big and elevate their game and skills. We are eager for the next edition to unfold in our journey of unveiling the latent badminton potential across our nation and preparing them for global excellenceIt’s inspiring to witness the boundless talent and enthusiasm within our young athletes. My journey as JBC mentor has been incredibly fulfilling, as I got the opportunity to guide these budding champions and witness the journey of these young badminton stars. This championship is more than a competition; it is a platform that nurtures dreams, ignites aspirations, and, I believe, it is laying the foundation for future gold medalists in the makingTournaments like these serve as an invaluable platform for nurturing and harnessing the potential of our country’s young badminton stars. Witnessing the enthusiasm, passion, and skill displayed by these emerging shuttlers reinforces the belief that our country has an immense reservoir of talent. My association as a JBC mentor has been a source of immense pride, particularly given the role that the championship is playing in creating an incredible platform that is serving as a powerful catalyst, empowering young players and bolstering their confidence to become future champions
Article Summary: The 7th pnb metlife junior badminton championship shattered records with over 8,200 young talent nationwide. The grand finale unfolded at the indira gandhi indoor stadium in new delhi, where the air was thick with competition, camaraderie, and the unmistakable passion for badminton.

Article Title: How to book IPL 2026 tickets online and offline, full IPL match schedule and other details
Article Text:
IPL 2026

IPL 2026 opening match



IPL 2026: Phase 1 schedule and double headers



Bengaluru

Mumbai

Guwahati

New Chandigarh

Lucknow

Kolkata

Chennai

Ahmedabad

Hyderabad

The phase will feature four double-headers, with afternoon matches starting at 3:30 PM IST and evening matches beginning at 7:30 PM IST. The first double-header of IPL 2026 takes place on April 4, when Delhi Capitals host Mumbai Indians at the Arun Jaitley Stadium in Delhi in the afternoon It will be followed by Gujarat Titans vs Rajasthan Royals at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad in the evening.

IPL 2026 home venues: Who is playing where



Royal Challengers Bengaluru will play five home matches in Bengaluru and two in Raipur.

Punjab Kings (PBKS) will host four matches at the PCA Stadium in New Chandigarh and three in Dharamshala.

Rajasthan Royals will begin their home campaign in Guwahati, where they will host Chennai Super Kings and Mumbai Indians. They will play four matches in Jaipur.

How to book IPL 2026 tickets online



Visit BookMyShow (bookmyshow.com), the District app (by Zomato), or your team's official website.

Search for the IPL 2026 match you want to attend using the date or team name.

Select your preferred seating category.

Choose your specific seats using the interactive stadium map.

Add the tickets to your cart and proceed to checkout.

Complete payment using a credit card, debit card, UPI, net banking, or digital wallet.

The ticket will be sent to your registered email address or mobile number.

How to buy IPL 2026 tickets offline



Visit the nearest authorised ticket counter at the stadium or a designated retail outlet. Locations are typically announced on the team’s official website and social media closer to the match.

Check availability for your preferred match and seating category at the counter.

Carry a valid photo ID — an Aadhaar card, PAN card, or passport will be accepted.

Choose your seats and confirm your selection with the ticketing staff.

Make your payment — cash, card, and digital wallets are generally accepted at most venues.

Collect your ticket on the spot after the transaction is complete.

The Board of Control for Cricket in India (BCCI) has announced the schedule for the first phase of the TATA Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026, and cricket fans across the country are already scrambling for tickets. The tournament begins on March 28, and the first phase runs through to April 12. The board has released the list of first 20 matches and a full schedule for the remainder of the tournament will be released once election dates are confirmed for three states that are set to hold State Assembly elections during this period.The 19th edition of IPL will begin with a blockbuster clash at the M. Chinnaswamy Stadium in Bengaluru, where defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) will take on Sunrisers Hyderabad (SRH) on March 28.Mumbai Indians face Kolkata Knight Riders at the iconic Wankhede Stadium in Mumbai the next day.A total of 20 matches will be played across 10 venues during the first phase:Several teams are splitting their home games across multiple cities this season:The BCCI has not yet officially reveled any information about the ticket sales but the process is expected to follow the same pattern as previous years.BookMyShow has already opened pre-sale registration for tickets to Mumbai Indians and Gujarat Titans home matches on its website and mobile app. Meanwhile, Zomato's District app has also prompted tickets via a dedicated page for IPL 2026 tickets. Article Title: How to play Pokémon Pokopia Friends multiplayer: Complete guide for players
Article Text:
Pokemon Pokopia (Image source: pokopia.pokemon.com)

What is Pokémon Pokopia Friends



Pokémon Pokopia Friends multiplayer features



Cooperative gameplay

Friendly battles

Shared exploration

Social interactions

How to unlock multiplayer mode in Pokémon Pokopia Friends



Progress through the early tutorial

Create or connect a player account

Access the multiplayer menu

Step-by-step guide to play Pokémon Pokopia Friends multiplayer



Step 1: Go to the menu for multiplayer

Players should start by choosing the multiplayer option from the main menu. This part has all the online features.

Step 2: Make or join a lobby

You can choose between two things in the game. A player can either join a lobby that is already there or make a new one.

If a player makes a lobby, they are the host. The host can ask friends to join and set the rules for the session.

Step 3: Send out invites to your friends.

You can invite people on your friend list to join the game. Once they accept the invitation, they will be in the same lobby.

Step 4: Pick an activity

When everyone is there, the group can pick an activity, like a battle challenge or a cooperative mission.

Step 5: Begin the session

All the players join in at the same time when the host starts the game or activity.

Tips for smooth multiplayer gameplay



Make sure the internet is working

Check to see if your friends are online

Keep the game up to date

Use the list of friends

Why multiplayer is important in Pokémon games



The role of Pokopia in Pokémon history



Pokémon games have always encouraged players to make friends, trade creatures, and fight together. Multiplayer features have become a big part of the Pokémon experience over the years. A lot of players like to explore game worlds on their own, but playing with others can make things even more fun. In Pokémon Pokopia Friends, the multiplayer feature is meant to make the game more fun and social.Pokopia, the famous place that was in Pokémon battle arenas in older games, is back with a new focus on friendship and playing together. Players can invite friends, form teams, and do things together in the game.The multiplayer system might seem a little confusing at first for people who are new to the game. It has a few steps, like connecting accounts, inviting friends, and joining shared sessions.Pokémon Pokopia Friends is a multiplayer-focused Pokémon experience set in the Pokopia arena environment. The setting is known for themed stadiums where trainers fight each other with their Pokémon teams.Reports say that the original idea for Pokopia locations was to make them big battle arenas where trainers from different areas could meet and compete.In Pokopia Friends, the idea has grown to include working together, fighting with friends, and exploring as a group.The main reason for the multiplayer system is to let trainers talk to each other in real time. Players can set up sessions, invite friends, and play different games with each other.The multiplayer mode in Pokopia Friends is all about playing with other people. Instead of playing alone, trainers can interact with others in several ways.Players can team up with friends and complete in-game activities together. In some missions, more than one trainer can work together in the same area to reach the same goals.Pokémon battles remain an important part of the experience. Trainers can challenge their friends to casual battles to see how good their Pokémon teams are.In some parts of the Pokopia world, players can explore together. This could mean going to arenas, talking to other trainers, or doing mini challenges.Players can talk to each other by sending invitations or joining friend sessions in the game.Players must complete a few simple tasks in the game before they can use the multiplayer features.Players have to finish the tutorial before the game starts. This part talks about how to move, how to interact with Pokémon, and the basics of the game.To use multiplayer functions, the game requires an online player account. This account is used to connect with other trainers.Once the tutorial is complete, the multiplayer option becomes available in the main menu. Players can then create or join sessions.Many new players wonder how to actually start a multiplayer session. The process usually follows a few simple steps.The multiplayer system is easy to use, but a few simple tips can help players avoid common problems.For smooth gameplay, you need a stable internet connection. If the connection is unstable, multiplayer sessions may drop.Players can only join friends who are currently playing the game online.Updates to games often make multiplayer more stable and fix bugs.Adding friends to the player list makes it easier to send invitations quickly.Being able to play with other people has been one of the most important parts of Pokémon games for a long time. Trading and fighting with other trainers has always been a part of the franchise.The point of playing Pokémon is to get players to talk to each other. Trading creatures, fighting each other, and exploring together can all make gaming more fun for everyone.The idea behind Pokopia Friends is the same: to play together and talk to other people.Pokopia first appeared as a big battle arena where trainers fought in themed stadiums. It became known for having a competitive atmosphere and battle challenges that were well-planned.Over time, the place became known for trainer meetups and planned fights. The new Pokopia Friends game takes this idea a step further by letting players do more than just fight.
Article Summary: Pokémon pokopia friends is a multiplayer-focused pokémon experience set in the pokopia arena environment. Players can set up sessions, invite friends, and play different games with each other. The multiplayer system might seem a little confusing at first for people who are new to the game.

Article Title: PlayStation Plus Games : PlayStation Plus Extra and Premium games revealed for March 2026: From Warhammer 40,000 Space Marine to Madden NFL 26
Article Text:
PC: Play Station Official Website

PlayStation Plus games catalogue 2026 revealed



Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2



Madden NFL 26: Gridiron Upgraded



Persona 5 Royal: Stylish Heists



Blasphemous 2: Gothic Adventure



PlayStation Plus has something for every taste



March’s PlayStation Plus Game Catalogue is shaping up to be quite the treat. It seems there’s something for everyone this month, whether you’re into brutal third-person shooters, classic JRPGs, or even arcade fighting. Fans of Warhammer, NFL, and Persona might be especially excited, but there’s plenty more tucked in here. Sony’s latest State of Play announcement teased the full list, and it’s set to go live on March 17. From intense multiplayer battles to hidden indie gems, rare collectibles, and unexpected surprises, the catalogue offers something new for both casual and hardcore gamers alike. From chaotic galactic warfare to stylish Tokyo heists, the March catalogue seems packed, diverse, and maybe even a little overwhelming for anyone who likes to play it all.There are big names, some under-the-radar gems, and one or two titles you might have forgotten existed.Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 drops players into a galaxy under siege. You step into the armour of Space Marine Titus and face off against relentless Tyranid swarms. It’s gory, fast-paced, and reportedly packed with hundreds of enemies on screen. The campaign appears endlessly replayable, with PvE missions supporting up to three players.Six classes to choose from, each with unique skills and cosmetics. And then there’s 6v6 PvP. It seems like a game you’ll either dive into solo or lose hours coordinating with friends.The developers behind World War Z are at it again. Fans of big, messy combat might find themselves glued to the screen.For football lovers, EA Sports Madden NFL 26 is reportedly taking the field with a new AI-driven system. Player movements and tactics are designed to reflect nearly a decade of real NFL plays. Saquon Barkley-style bursts upfield, quarterback strategy adaptations, and traits for individual players all aim to make it feel alive. It seems like a big deal for those who care about realism in sports games. The All-Madden legacy feels alive. If you’ve ever wanted to play like the pros, this might be your chance.Persona 5 Royal returns with all the flair the series is known for. Tokyo feels alive, the Phantom Thieves are back, and the story is expanded with new characters, confidants, and story arcs. There’s even a grappling hook mechanic now. It seems small, but it changes how you move through dungeons. Persona 5 Royal Ultimate Edition adds extra DLC, costumes, battles, and Personas. For long-time fans, it’s basically a deluxe return trip. For newcomers, it might be a little overwhelming.Blasphemous 2 takes players on a dark, punishing journey. The Penitent One awakens in a strange land and must face grotesque enemies and titanic bosses. Choices apparently matter, but there’s no “wrong” path, just one filled with brutal encounters. It is designed for those who like a challenge. Expect tight controls, dark art, and an eerie soundtrack. If gothic platforming is your thing, this one reportedly delivers.Metal Eden is reportedly a sci-fi FPS with cybernetic warfare and a suicide mission vibe. Lord of the Rings: Return to Moria lets you explore procedurally generated dwarven mines, solo or with friends. Astroneer encourages creativity with fully deformable planets, letting players reshape worlds with ease.PlayStation Plus Premium gets a classic throwback with Tekken Dark Resurrection. It seems like a fun way to relive arcade-style 3D fighting, complete with quirky modes like Tekken Bowl and the familiar story battles.
Article Summary: Playstation plus game catalogue goes live on march 17. There's something for everyone, whether you're into third-person shooters, jrpgs, or arcade fighting. Ea sports madden nfl 26 is reportedly taking the field with a new ai-driven system. Persona 5 royal ultimate edition adds extra dlc, costumes, battles, and personas.

Article Title: ICC shares 'Made with Google Gemini' photo of Indian Cricket team
Article Text:
A TEAM OF WINNERS 🥇

Suryakumar Yadav-led India etch their name in history as they become the first team to defend the #T20WorldCup 🙌

Made with Google Gemini

Tech leaders applaud the ‘Men in Blue’

Google’s New AI Is BANANAS: How To Use Gemini Nano Banana

A ‘record-breaking’ T20 World Cup final

India defeated New Zealand by 96 runs in the T20 World Cup final in Ahmedabad, becoming the first nation to successfully defend its title. The victory is also special because it is the first time that a team has won a T20 World Cup title on home soil and also marks India’s third T20 world title – the most by any country in the tournament’s history. To commemorate the “Triple Crown” – 2024 T20 World Cup and 2025 Champions Trophy wins – the ICC shared a special “Made with Google Gemini” tribute. The AI-generated illustration captures the spirit of the squad with the trophy.The victory caught the attention of Silicon Valley’s biggest names – Google CEO Sundar Pichai and Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella – both of whom are well-known cricket enthusiasts.Google CEO Sundar Pichai, who attended matches during the tournament, joked about his own timing while praising the champions. “Congrats India on winning the ICC Men's T20 World Cup! Chose the wrong game to go watch :),” Pichai shared.Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella gave a special shout-out to the tournament's standout performers: “Congratulations to Team India... @Jaspritbumrah93, once again a match winner when it mattered most.@IamSanjuSamson, what a tournament and what an impact.”The final was a masterclass in power-hitting and disciplined bowling by India. New Zealand captain Mitchell Santner won the toss and chose to bowl. India’s openers Sanju Samson (89) and Abhishek Sharma (52) dismantled the Kiwi attack, posting 92 runs in the first six overs—the highest Powerplay score in T20 World Cup history. Late-inning fireworks from Ishan Kishan and Shivam Dube pushed India to a massive 255/5.In response, New Zealand’s chase never found its rhythm. Jasprit Bumrah returned incredible figures of 4 for 15 to lead a bowling unit that bundled out the visitors well short of the target.
Article Summary: India defeated new zealand by 96 runs in the t20 world cup final in ahmedabad, becoming the first nation to successfully defend its title. The victory is also special because it is the first time that a team has won a t 20 world cup title on home soil and also marks india’s third t20 world title – the most by any country in the tournament's history.

Article Title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai says ‘chose the wrong match…’, Microsoft's Satya Nadella wishes team as India win ICC Men's T20 World Cup
Article Text:
ICC Men's T20 World Cup: India make history

‘Champions!’ Narendra Modi Celebrates Team India’s Stunning ICC Men's T20 World Cup Title Win

India made history after winning back-to-back T20 World Cup titles, becoming the first country to defend its title and win it at home. Moreover, it was also the third T20 World Cup title for the ‘Men in Blue’ – most for any any country since the start of the tournament. India’s win over New Zealand not just captivated billions in India but also caught the attention of some of the biggest names in the tech world too. Both Google CEO Sundar Pichai and Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella congratulated the team India on winning the cup.“Congrats India on winning the ICC Men's T20 World Cup!,” said Pichai, who was present at one of the matches during the tournament, had a light-hearted confession to make.“Chose the wrong game to go watch:) what a stadium and atmosphere.Well played to the other semi finalists, SA, Eng and Nz!! Also so exciting to see the game expand to so many countries and congrats to ICC for a great tournament!” he added.Satya Nadella was also excited to see India win and he particularly mentioned Jasprit Bumrah and Sanju Samson for their performances throughout the tournament.“Congratulations to Team India on a fantastic T20 World Cup win 🇮🇳 Tough luck today, New Zealand. @Jaspritbumrah93, once again a match winner when it mattered most.@IamSanjuSamson, what a tournament and what an impact. Absolutely incredible,” Nadella said.India dismantled New Zealand to win the 2026 ICC Men’s T20 World Cup, becoming the first team in history to defend the title and the first to win it on home soil. The victory completes a “Triple Crown” for India, adding to their 2024 T20 World Cup and 2025 Champions Trophy trophies.New Zealand captain Mitchell Santner won the toss and chose to field. Sanju Samson (89 off 46 balls) and Abhishek Sharma (52 off 21 balls) came out swinging and never looked back. The pair put on 98 runs in just 43 balls, including a powerplay score of 92/0 — the highest powerplay total in T20 World Cup history. Soon Ishan Kishan blazed his way to 54 off just 25 balls with Shivam Dube finishing with a 26 off just 8 balls to push India's total to 255 for 5.Chasing 256, New Zealand's batting lineup crumbled against a disciplined Indian bowling attack. Jasprit Bumrah returned figures of 4 for 15; Axar Patel took three wickets, while Hardik Pandya, Varun Chakaravarthy, and Abhishek Sharma took one each.
Article Summary: India beat new zealand to win the 2026 icc men’s t20 world cup. India became the first team in history to defend the title and the first to win it on home soil. Google ceo sundar pichai and microsoft ceo satya nadella congratulated the team india.
